caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion titled "No More Time: Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty." The scene is set up as a split-screen interview, with Margaret Harrington on the left and Greg Delanty on the right. Margaret, dressed in a patterned top and wearing red earrings, listens attentively while Greg, who has a white beard and glasses, speaks passionately about his climate crisis poems. The background behind Margaret includes some green lights, possibly decorative, while Greg's background features a blue wall with framed pictures and an "OPEN" sign. The conversation seems engaging, with both participants actively involved in the dialogue, emphasizing the urgency of addressing climate change through poetry.
